creator: wjw@digiware.nl
text:
Created attachment 160670
More info for verboseboot message

I found this in my logs:
zfs kernel: ENOMEM 0xfffff80217394000 on 0xfffff80007881600(ada0)

Which turns out to be a verboseboot message, which seems to about something that does no harm.

I suggest to add atleast the filename to the message.
